overview: Sollie Health and Wellness offers direct primary care, hormone replacement therapy (TRT and BHRT), medical weight loss programs, and wellness injections in Spring, TX. Care is delivered without insurance requirements through personalized consultations and customized treatment plans.
highlights: NAD+ IV therapy and intramuscular wellness injections
targetAudience: People seeking hormone optimization, weight management, and primary care outside the insurance system in the Houston area.
